zh.lifeSummary: Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias是Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias和Aldonza Ramirez的女兒，於大約1264年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞瓦爾德拉班諾。她於大約1283年與Fernán González de Henestrosa在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在西班牙卡斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias是Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias和Aldonza Ramirez的女儿，于大约1264年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞瓦爾德拉班諾。她于大约1283年与Fernán González de Henestrosa在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在西班牙卡斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Asturias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from the Asturias region in northern Spain, named by the Romans for its contemporary inhabitants, the Astures.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias was born about 1264, in Valderrábano, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spain as the daughter of Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias and Aldonza Ramirez. She married Fernán González de Henestrosa about 1283, in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Castile, Spain.

Elle a épousé Fernán González de Henestrosa environ 1283, à Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Castile, Espagne.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria de Henestrosa de Asturiasは約1264年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンプアレンシアヴァルデルaバノでArias Diaz de Valderabano de AsturiasとAldonza Ramirezの娘として生まれた。約1283年にスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラセヴィラでFernán González de Henestrosaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はスペインカスティルで死去した。

ko.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: 스페인 산탠더 발데오리 헨스트로자 데 라스 퀸탠이라스

ko.lifeSummary: Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias(은)는 대략 1264년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 파렌샤 발더a바노에서 Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias(와)과 Aldonza Ramirez의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1283년 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라 세비라에서 Fernán González de Henestrosa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스페인 카스틸에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Fernán González de Henestrosa aproximadamente 1283, em Sevilla, Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Castile, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias родилась около 1264 г. в местности валдиррaбано, пеиленся, кастилла и леoн, Испания. Её родителей звали Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias и Aldonza Ramirez. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fernán González de Henestrosa около 1283 г. в местности севилла, севилла, андалукiа, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности кастиль, Испания.
